runtime: Phaser compatibility renderer with persistent actor sprites

grounding.shadow: faint contact ellipse beneath every visible actor
grounding.walkTrigger: actual world coordinate displacement greater than 0.08
grounding.stationaryRule: action labels cannot create a walk cycle

activityVisuals.pool: perimeter walk, fixed stance, cue through both hands, thrust, watch, turn exit
activityVisuals.sleep: horizontal body orientation under foreground blanket layer
activityVisuals.swim: 8 FPS directional stroke exception without ground shadow
activityVisuals.arcadeDeskReadingPhone: specific seated compression and object overlay alignment
activityVisuals.showerBath: specific wash frame alternation behind shower foreground
activityVisuals.basketball: base sprite plus dedicated basketball foreground action overlays

knownLimitations: Directional sheets require browser crop and scale approval.
Activity specific transforms are first pass sprite states and need later dedicated sheets where the matrix requires them.
Main remains on the previous Canvas build until the Phaser parity branch passes testing.
